'''鈭歴-k-th''' ('''kasakath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jogtrot|jogtrot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jogtrot|jogtrot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-k-th
|-
! Lemma
| kasakath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisakath|thisakath]] || [[word:jisakath|jisakath]] || [[word:shisakath|shisakath]] || [[word:kisakath|kisakath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusakath|thuthusakath]] || [[word:jujusakath|jujusakath]] || [[word:shushusakath|shushusakath]] || [[word:kukusakath|kukusakath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusakath|thusakath]] || [[word:jusakath|jusakath]] || [[word:shusakath|shusakath]] || [[word:kusakath|kusakath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusakath|thusakath]] || [[word:jusakath|jusakath]] || [[word:shusakath|shusakath]] || [[word:kusakath|kusakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesakath|thesakath]] || [[word:jesakath|jesakath]] || [[word:shesakath|shesakath]] || [[word:kesakath|kesakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosakath|thothosakath]] || [[word:jojosakath|jojosakath]] || [[word:shoshosakath|shoshosakath]] || [[word:kokosakath|kokosakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosakath|thosakath]] || [[word:josakath|josakath]] || [[word:shosakath|shosakath]] || [[word:kosakath|kosakath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosakath|thosakath]] || [[word:josakath|josakath]] || [[word:shosakath|shosakath]] || [[word:kosakath|kosakath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]] || [[word:sakath|sakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sakath|th忙sakath]] || [[word:j忙sakath|j忙sakath]] || [[word:sh忙sakath|sh忙sakath]] || [[word:k忙sakath|k忙sakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasakath|thathasakath]] || [[word:jajasakath|jajasakath]] || [[word:shashasakath|shashasakath]] || [[word:kakasakath|kakasakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasakath|thasakath]] || [[word:jasakath|jasakath]] || [[word:shasakath|shasakath]] || [[word:kasakath|kasakath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasakath|thasakath]] || [[word:jasakath|jasakath]] || [[word:shasakath|shasakath]] || [[word:kasakath|kasakath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasakath|shasakath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasakath|goshasakath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasakath|gokishasakath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasakathn眉|shasakathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasakathnkn眉|goshasakathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakathn眉|gokishasakathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasakathsh毛|shasakathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasakathnksh毛|goshasakathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasakathsh毛|gokishasakathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakathro|shasakathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakathnkro|goshasakathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakathro|gokishasakathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakathmu|shasakathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakathnkmu|goshasakathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakathmu|gokishasakathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasakathsher|shasakathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasakathnksher|goshasakathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasakathsher|gokishasakathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasakathng|shasakathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasakathnkng|goshasakathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasakathng|gokishasakathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasakathya|shasakathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasakathnkya|goshasakathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasakathya|gokishasakathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasakathyam|shasakathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasakathnkyam|goshasakathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasakathyam|gokishasakathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasakathn眉sh毛|shasakathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasakathnkn眉sh毛|goshasakathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasakathn眉sh毛|gokishasakathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakathn眉ro|shasakathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakathnkn眉ro|goshasakathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakathn眉ro|gokishasakathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakathn眉mu|shasakathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakathnkn眉mu|goshasakathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakathn眉mu|gokishasakathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasakathsh毛n眉|shasakathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasakathnksh毛n眉|goshasakathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakathsh毛n眉|gokishasakathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakathsh毛ro|shasakathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakathnksh毛ro|goshasakathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakathsh毛ro|gokishasakathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakathsh毛mu|shasakathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakathnksh毛mu|goshasakathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakathsh毛mu|gokishasakathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasakathron眉|shasakathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasakathnkron眉|goshasakathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakathron眉|gokishasakathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasakathrosh毛|shasakathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasakathnkrosh毛|goshasakathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasakathrosh毛|gokishasakathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakathromu|shasakathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakathnkromu|goshasakathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakathromu|gokishasakathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasakathmun眉|shasakathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasakathnkmun眉|goshasakathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakathmun眉|gokishasakathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasakathmush毛|shasakathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasakathnkmush毛|goshasakathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasakathmush毛|gokishasakathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakathmuro|shasakathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakathnkmuro|goshasakathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakathmuro|gokishasakathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
